description: Blanket PO release invoice with release number against master agreement and period covered

RELEASE INVOICE
Invoice #: RI-2025-BPO-0044
Invoice Date: 2025-11-01   Due Date: 2025-12-01
Vendor: Midwest Office Products & Facilities LLC
Vendor Tax ID: XX-XXX3348
Vendor Address: 2200 Distribution Circle, St. Louis, MO 63110
Bill To: RiverBend Healthcare System
   Accounts Payable, 100 Medical Center Drive, St. Louis, MO 63108
Blanket PO Number: BPO-RBH-2025-001
Release Number: BPO-RBH-2025-001-REL-08
Master Agreement: MSA-OFP-2025-RBH
Release Period Covered: November 1 – November 30, 2025
Payment Terms: Net 30   Currency: USD

This release invoice is issued under Blanket Purchase Order BPO-RBH-2025-001
executed 2025-01-15, valid through 2025-12-31. This is Release #8 of 12 planned
monthly releases. Cumulative releases to date: $312,480.00.

Release Line Items (November 2025):
1. Copy Paper 8.5x11 Letter White 500 sht/ream, 10 cases  @ $48.00/case   $  480.00
2. Printer Toner HP 26A Black (CF226A), Qty 8 @ $72.50 ea                 $  580.00
3. Disinfectant Wipes Clorox 75ct canisters, Qty 50 @ $6.80 ea            $  340.00
4. Nitrile Exam Gloves Medium, 10 boxes/case, Qty 6 cases @ $88.00/case   $  528.00
5. Facility Cleaning Services — Monthly Contract (November)                $4,200.00
6. Break Room Coffee Supplies Package                                      $  316.40
7. HVAC Filter Replacement 20x25x1 MERV-13, Qty 12 @ $18.90 ea           $  226.80

Release Subtotal:                       $6,671.20
Sales Tax (MO 4.225%):                  $  281.86
Invoice Total:                          $6,953.06
Amount Due:                             $6,953.06

Remaining Blanket PO Balance (estimated): $49,566.94
For release inquiries: releases@midwestofficeproducts.com | 314-555-0177
